description: Triage Few-Shot with examples per class

input.title: System crash on production server
input.description: The production server crashes intermittently causing complete service outage. Critical business operations are affected.

input.title: Database connection pool exhausted
input.description: Application cannot connect to database after 10 minutes of uptime. All users get connection errors.

input.title: Add new filter option in search
input.description: Users want to filter search results by date range. This is a nice-to-have enhancement.

input.title: Typo in footer text
input.description: The word 'Contac Us' should be 'Contact Us' in the footer section.

input.title: API returns wrong error message
input.description: When a user enters invalid credentials, the error message says 'User not found' instead of 'Invalid password' which is a security issue.
